title: 2024 Iloilo City flood — recorded road-closure segments (PLACEHOLDER)

notes: Replacement recipe: (1) fetch the S1-GFM 2024 Iloilo flood extent (data/fetch, INVENTORY S1-GFM); (2) intersect with OSM-ILO drivable ways to get flooded segment ids + measured lengths; (3) replace `observations`, set provisional=false, and update provenance with the event date + processing steps; (4) re-run the VAL-02 gate.
